text: Welcome aboard, @guide_sam! You're now an event helper. Looking forward to your contributions to our community events!
Hey @newbie_kim, welcome to the community! We're glad to have you as a new member. Feel free to introduce yourself!
Welcome, @mentor_lina! Thank you for stepping up as a mentor. Your experience will be invaluable to our newer members!
Welcome to the community, @helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. Thanks for volunteering to help keep things running smoothly!
